message:
feat(hook): skip repo_updater pre-sync when local sync roots are dirty

Add detect_dirty_sync_roots() that runs `git status --porcelain` on each
sync root. If any root has uncommitted changes, skip the repo_updater
pre-sync entirely and log the dirty paths. This prevents sync conflicts
when local repos have in-progress work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
